item.title: Goodbye our beloved Imgurian friend
item.description: This one is my favorite. That mischievous smile, just having a great time♥️ I’ve added the memorial post I’ve made for our dear friend. Take a moment and read it. Be kind to one another, love each other ♥️ You’ll never be forgotten sweet Becca. https://imgur.com/gallery/hWLwYFA @TinyOctopus has been incredible in sharing what Becca would have wanted. She will be cremated. So as far as we know there will not be any funeral expenses. Now, when it comes to what the family is planning (memorial service, celebration of life) We don’t know. I will gladly share any information I receive to pass along to those of you who want to give. Becca asked for this in lieu of flowers. https://donatenow.networkforgood.org/ABLCS
item.dc:creator: Mayyybe

item.dc:creator: SubtleJules

item.title: Light a candle for our beloved Imgurian @Benedictcucumberpatch
item.description:
Our friend has been taken from us today. She bravely chose to decide when to shut her own door on this last adventure here on earth. Many , like myself have recently found her posts about living her last days traveling around with her not always trusty “Dobby” camper van. Taking us along with her sharing beautiful pictures and videos. Her positivity was something that was incredible. Still choosing to smile in the face of the greatest and most terrifying battle of her short 26 years on this rock. I am in awe of her bravery. I’ve cried and kept her close to my heart these last few days… Moved by her spirit, and kinds words she has left us all to ponder on. Hold fast Becca, this next journey is beyond all of us. I pray that you finally found your peace and are now existing somewhere beyond the clouds , flying free… free from pain, free from the body that was failing you. I’ll light a candle for you , you’ll never be forgotten. If there was any lesson I’ve learned from her it’s too live life to the fullest!!! Hug your loved ones!!! Make beautiful memories !! And always chose love and kindness ♥️ in the face of the hardest days of our lives. One last toast (salud) to our brave girl !!! @benedictcucumberpatch
The outpouring of love from all of you incredible people has really touched my ♥️ heart. Thank you for taking the time to read my post of our lovely and never forgotten Imgurian friend Becca ♥️ Love each other…… Becca’s has asked for this in lieu of flowers. https://donatenow.networkforgood.org/ABLCS
item.dc:creator: Mayyybe

item.title: The truth about the dangers of marijuana
item.description: Most Viral Edit: from the comments I have gleaned two things: 1. Bill's a dick (haven't thought about him in years so I have no skin in that game). 2. Some of you think someone here is saying that marijuana is completely without risk. No one is saying that. They're saying it's not as dangerous as alcohol. I agree with that statement and I could see an argument for incidents vs. availability as a counter point but no one is disputing that either.

item.title: Crater rim as tall as a 5 story building collapsed
item.description: https://www.instagram.com/reel/CWoE6wQKFCe/ By the drone operator: "Luckiest drone shot ever? I happened to be flying over the Fagradalsfjall volcanic crater when part of the crater rim collapsed. That part may look “small”, but it’s actually around the same size of a 5 story building!"

item.title: Help find my cousin Jason
item.description: My cousin is missing from Golden Colorado. We are hoping he returns home soon. Please share and call the police with any information. Anyone who sees Abel is asked to call Jefferson County Sheriff in Colorado at 303-271-0211 or 911. https://www.thedenverchannel.com/news/local-news/jeffco-sheriffs-office-searching-for-missing-at-risk-teen Updates available from the Jefferson County sheriff Facebook. https://www.facebook.com/JeffersonCountySheriff

item.title: The Price of Being Loved...
item.description: So we lost a good one yesterday, way too soon, but on her own terms and I wanted to find something to post. But nothing seemed right or appropriate but at least there is a chicken with sneakers.... @TinyOctopus did it so much better. @BenedictCucumberpatch you will be missed and remembered @IWANTTOBETHEVOID I think said it best with their comment: "She left one day. Where did she go you ask? I don't know where she went, or why or how. But she was here, and it was wonderful" https://imgur.com/gallery/hWLwYFA
item.dc:creator: KingofSadness

item.title: The 99th vol. of "I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dump
item.description:
STAY TUNED! I'll be releasing more MeeMays back into the wild each Mon - Thu between 11am and Noon EST, in my ""I'm not actually removing these from my phone, I just wanted to share them so that I could feel some sort of connection in this dismal world" Dumps" Or use Imgur's new "Follow" Feature, which will alert you whenever one of my dumps goes Viral. PRO FACT: I upvote 90% - 99% of positive or neutral comments on my posts, as well as ≈50% of negative ones.
No, I don't actually call them MeeMays, OR DO I?!?!
Solomon’s Wise Judgment (the jist of it) Two women came to King Solomon with a baby, both claiming the child as their own. Solomon said, “Divide the living child in two, and give half to one, and half to the other.” The actual mother, fearing for the safety of her son said, “Give the child to her, do not harm him!” But the other said, “Shit fam, split him up! Sounds fair to me!” Solomon said, “The first woman is the mother, she'd rather give away the child than see it harmed."
whores d'ovaries
♫ When you swim in the sea, ♪ ♪ and an eel bites your knee, ♫ ♫ that's a moray! ♪
I'm so glad someone is finally presenting us news!
♫ ALL THROUGH THE BUS! ♪
Sounds like he's in Trouble!
Me In IRL Life, To TBH Honest
Nurses, like dogs, are a gift from Jod that we absolutely do not deserve. I doubt that we, as a species, will ever do enough good to *earn* either.
I'd go buy a h•ckin Lotto ticket
#Dump #Meme_Dump #Phone_Dump #AncientMemes #AdolfHitlerSchoolForTheArts #TheWhoring20s #EatingAppsTakingNaps #WhatIfNobodyShotJFK #AndHisHeadJustDidThat #SaveTheBEEEEEES #BeeLM #EatNamesAndTakeAss #JettfreyEpsfuelCandnt #CommeltSteelBeamicide #HitlerAteBigBagsOfDicks #IfYoureDeadInside #MasturbatingIsNecrophilia #AllTiddiesAreGoodTiddies #FreeTheNipple Shoutout to my fellow Dumpers: @DeafKitten (DK Dump) @CodyBurkett (Pippin) @AbbiiStabbii (Images Of Note) @DigiT00l @DumpsterKoala @OhVallyOfPlenty @CeleryMan7 As promised, only the last 50ish Dumperoos: Vol 48 https://imgur.com/gallery/P9srHhp Vol 49 https://imgur.com/gallery/BUv6qOC Vol 50 https://imgur.com/gallery/k67M01G Vol 51 https://imgur.com/gallery/nXUSEtU Vol 52 https://imgur.com/gallery/ySPYez7 Vol 53 https://imgur.com/gallery/LSplkEf Vol 54 https://imgur.com/gallery/sI6JnEV Vol 55 https://imgur.com/gallery/ChYA12H Vol 56 https://imgur.com/gallery/G5dE3Om Vol 57 https://imgur.com/gallery/yRvJuRE Vol 58 https://imgur.com/gallery/rLK5Y1q Vol 59 https://imgur.com/a/iELzZ66 -Removed from gallery for one "offensive" image Vol 60 https://imgur.com/gallery/kCMzVTP - Reaction JPGs, GIFs and MP4s v.
